name: neuromem
description: Brain-inspired persistent memory for coding agents — remember, recall, consolidate, and forget naturally

settings.name: OpenAI API Key
settings.description: API key for embeddings and LLM consolidation (optional — Ollama default works without it)

settings.name: User ID
settings.description: Override user ID (default: read from neuromem.yaml). Wizard mints a UUID on first init.

neuromem._comment: v0.4.7 default — points at the in-process MCP mounted by `neuromem ui`. To use the standalone process instead (Docker, agent-host scenarios), replace this object with: { "command": "python", "args": ["-m", "neuromem.mcp"], "cwd": "${workspacePath}" }
